message:
HTTP body validation, RPC retry timeline tests, session orphan detection, SSE spec compliance

Four targeted fixes across core infrastructure:

src/connectors/http.rs:
- Reject requests specifying both body and body_bytes simultaneously
  with InvalidRequest error, preventing ambiguous payload construction
- Test for the new validation

src/rpc.rs:
- AlwaysErrorProvider mock that returns StopReason::Error for retry
  testing; rpc_abort_retry_emits_ordered_retry_timeline test verifies
  auto_retry_start/auto_retry_end/agent_end appear in correct order
  when a retry is aborted, and terminal error is "Retry aborted"

src/session.rs:
- Session loading now detects entries whose parent_id references a
  missing entry (orphaned parent links from corruption or truncation)
- SessionOpenDiagnostics gains orphaned_parent_links field with
  structured SessionOpenOrphanedParentLink records
- Warning emitted per orphaned link with actionable context
- Existing corrupted_middle_entry test expanded with structured JSON
  diagnostics and explicit orphan-link assertions

src/sse.rs:
- SSE spec compliance: events with empty event name now default to
  "message" per the SSE specification instead of dispatching with
  empty string, matching browser EventSource behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
